title: Amtech G1450 Aluminium plasterer's hawk
features: DURABLE: This lightweight plasterer's hawk is made from heavy gauge aluminium with a smooth straight edge with rounded corners
VERSATILE: With a detachable handle, it has a surface area of 300mm (13") x 300mm (13")
SIZE CAPACITY: 13 inch / 300 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Hawk See more
